evals.prompt: Search my Zotero library for anything related to 'machine learning' and show me the titles, authors, and dates.
evals.expected_output: List of matching Zotero items with titles, creators, and dates
expectations: The local Zotero API was queried at localhost:23119
The search endpoint was used with q=machine learning or similar
Results are displayed with titles, authors/creators, and dates
Item keys are shown for follow-up operations

evals.prompt: Add this book to my Zotero library: 'The Printing Press as an Agent of Change' by Elizabeth Eisenstein, published by Cambridge University Press in 1979, ISBN 978-0521299558. Tag it with 'history of printing' and 'media studies'.
evals.expected_output: Book created in Zotero with all metadata and tags
expectations: The connector/saveItems endpoint was used to create the item
Title, author, publisher, date, and ISBN were all included
Tags 'history of printing' and 'media studies' were added
The BibTeX was sent as text/plain
The created item details were shown back to the user
